meta.title: Configure Security, Networking, and Service Health Validation

subtask.role: You are a DevOps Engineer specializing in Kubernetes. Implement subtask 1.4.

context.overview: Implement security policies, network isolation, RBAC configurations, and perform comprehensive health checks to ensure all infrastructure components are properly configured and operational.

requirements.description: Create service accounts and RBAC policies for secure service access. Configure network policies for proper service isolation and communication rules. Set up persistent volume claims with appropriate storage classes. Implement monitoring and alerting for all deployed services. Perform end-to-end connectivity tests and validate that all operators are healthy and ready for application deployment.
